text: The commissioner shall evaluate and approve any for-hire motor vehicle safety program created pursuant to Insurance Law § 2353 (For-hire motor vehicle safety program) within sixty days of the effective date of such section.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 3
#### Article 12. Other Provisions
##### § 397-C — For-hire motor vehicle safety program

The commissioner shall evaluate and approve any for-hire motor vehicle safety program created pursuant to Insurance Law § 2353 (For-hire motor vehicle safety program) within sixty days of the effective date of such section.

*Last modified: Feb. 19, 2021*
